title: Check in Codex init model refresh and current operational state
objective: Create a clean local commit on main that includes the updated tower init Codex model picker defaults, the associated tests, and the current Tower operational artifacts so the working tree is clean afterward.
instructions: Review the full current working tree and stage all intended tracked and untracked changes for this check-in, including src/, tests/, and current .control-tower operational files.
Create one clean local commit on main with a message that clearly reflects the Codex init model refresh and captured operational state.
constraints: Do not force-push or rewrite history.
Do not modify product code beyond minimal git hygiene required for the commit.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket with commit hash, commit message, included scope, and final working tree status.
definition_of_done: A local commit exists on main.
The working tree is clean after the commit.
